title: senecio tabulicola
intro: Senecio tabulicola, also known as Jacob's ladder, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the western United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Senecio tabulicola include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and injuries.
